## Weekly schedule

* [Pre-recorded videos](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uwKiT1o1TkI&list=PLyCNZ_xXGzpm7W9jLqbIyBAiSO5jDwJeE): approximately 1 hour per week [Slides](https://github.com/robjhyndman/fpp3_slides){.badge .badge-small .badge-red}
* Online lecture: 10am Mondays
* Workshop: 1pm Tuesdays, [Lecture Theatre S4, 16 Rainforest Walk](https://maps.app.goo.gl/4AmDLWkY1yYZviFz8)
* Tutorials: 1 hour per week, Wednesdays and Thursdays
* [Recordings](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/lti/view.php?id=6049159)


|Week        |Topic                               |Chapter                          |Assignments             |Quizzes |
|:-----------|:-----------------------------------|:--------------------------------|:-----------------------|:-------|
|27 Jul |[Introduction to forecasting and R](./week1/index.html)|[1. Getting started](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/intro.html)|                        |        |
|03 Aug |[Time series graphics](./week2/index.html)|[2. Time series graphics](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/graphics.html)|[Forecasting Competition](assignments/competition.qmd)|[Week 2](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049177)|
|10 Aug |[Time series decomposition](./week3/index.html)|[3. Time series decomposition](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/decomposition.html)|                        |[Week 3](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049179)|

|07 Sep |[Exponential smoothing](./week7/index.html)|[8. Exponential smoothing](https://OTexts.com/fpp3/expsmooth.html)|                        |[Week 7](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049187)|

## R package installation

Here is the code to install the R packages we will be using in this unit.

```r
install.packages(c("tidyverse","fpp3", "GGally"), dependencies = TRUE)
```
